use_cases: Dynamic hero section background for creative landing pages
Interactive canvas background for media and entertainment websites
Visual backdrop for SaaS product showcases
Shader-based dreamscape effect for artistic portfolios
Real-time WebGL visualization for dev tools demo pages
ai_summary: An interactive WebGL shader component that renders a colorful dreamscape visualization using native WebGL2/WebGL with custom GLSL shaders. The effect responds to mouse movement in real-time, featuring configurable parameters for hue, speed, intensity, and complexity. Built with performance optimization using throttled callbacks and a continuous animation loop.
